page_metadata.bioconda__summary: Coalescent tree simulation along a transmission network
page_metadata.biotools__summary: CoaTran is a tool that, given a transmission network and sample times, will simulate a coalescent phylogeny constrained by the transmission network.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: CoaTran is a tool that, given a transmission network and sample times, will simulate a coalescent phylogeny constrained by the transmission network.
